item.title: Probably should do a little warm-up before my legend 1 hits hahahaha #ClashOfClans #coc #Legend1
item.description:
Probably should do a little warm-up before my legend 1 hits hahahaha

#ClashOfClans #coc #Legend1

item.title: RT by @moscht_coc: 🚨We are thrilled to announce that RN eSports and Horizon Esports are officially joining forces! More details on our World Championship qualifying roster and the community tournament rosters will follow in the next few days! 💥
item.description:
🚨We are thrilled to announce that RN eSports and Horizon Esports are officially joining forces!

More details on our World Championship qualifying roster and the community tournament rosters will follow in the next few days! 💥

item.title: Selfmade Queen Charge Bait went pretty well😈 #CoCeSports #ClashOfClans #BaseBuilding #eslbase
item.description:
Selfmade Queen Charge Bait went pretty well😈

#CoCeSports #ClashOfClans #BaseBuilding #eslbase


Video

item.title: RT by @moscht_coc: Our journey comes to an end in Round 6 of the LB It wasn't the result we were aiming for, but we're incredibly proud of the team's effort, commitment, and determination. It was an amazing run! ❤️‍🔥 We'll keep grinding and come back stronger. See you next month! #CoCEsports
item.description:
Our journey comes to an end in Round 6 of the LB

It wasn't the result we were aiming for, but we're incredibly proud of the team's effort, commitment, and determination. It was an amazing run! ❤️‍🔥

We'll keep grinding and come back stronger.

See you next month!

#CoCEsports

item.title: RT by @moscht_coc: Qualed for the second day of the Monthly Qualifiers ✅ We'll keep pushing towards the Monthly Qualifiers today Let's show them what we have!🫡
item.description:
Qualed for the second day of the Monthly Qualifiers ✅

We'll keep pushing towards the Monthly Qualifiers today

Let's show them what we have!🫡

item.title: Let’s celebrate this achievement and remember, this is just the beginning. Together, we can achieve even greater things. Well done, @Confusion_CoC ⚡️💛 #ClashOfClans #CoC #Legend #cwl
item.description:
Let’s celebrate this achievement and remember, this is just the beginning. Together, we can achieve even greater things. Well done, @Confusion_CoC ⚡️💛

#ClashOfClans #CoC #Legend #cwl

item.title: RT by @moscht_coc: Ladder Stage complete ✅ Strong start to the month – we're sitting at #10 in the rankings! 🔥 Really proud of the team so far. Let's keep this momentum going and show what we've got in the Monthly Qualifiers! 🏆 ➡️ Monthly Qualifiers coming up this weekend 👀
item.description:
Ladder Stage complete ✅

Strong start to the month – we're sitting at #10 in the rankings! 🔥 Really proud of the team so far. Let's keep this momentum going and show what we've got in the Monthly Qualifiers! 🏆

➡️ Monthly Qualifiers coming up this weekend 👀

item.title: Proud of the team @horizon_coc 🦅☀️ #ClashofClans #CoC #eSports #ClashOfWorlds
item.description:
Proud of the team @horizon_coc 🦅☀️

#ClashofClans #CoC #eSports #ClashOfWorlds

item.title: RT by @moscht_coc: Closed ladder with a splendid performance once again! 3 matches/3 wins 😍 Total: 17 wins/3 loses Finishing #7 on the leader board for now
item.description:
Closed ladder with a splendid performance once again!

3 matches/3 wins 😍

Total: 17 wins/3 loses

Finishing #7 on the leader board for now

item.title: RT by @moscht_coc: Nice bounce-back after yesterday's performance❤️‍🔥 6 matches/6 wins Finishing #12 for today Congrats to the team, nice work!
item.description:
Nice bounce-back after yesterday's performance❤️‍🔥

6 matches/6 wins

Finishing #12 for today

Congrats to the team, nice work!

item.title: RT by @moscht_coc: Today didn't go as planned but still in a nice position! 3 Wins ✅ 3 Loses ❌ Let's recover tmr! 🫡
item.description:
Today didn't go as planned but still in a nice position!

3 Wins ✅
3 Loses ❌

Let's recover tmr! 🫡

item.title: RT by @moscht_coc: July looking good so far ❤️‍🔥 We finish our first day of ladder with a perfect performance 5/5 👀 Hyped for more...
item.description:
July looking good so far ❤️‍🔥

We finish our first day of ladder with a perfect performance 5/5 👀

Hyped for more...

item.title: June was decent⚡️ Hyped for Ladder without those💩 eventtroops🔥 #CoCeSports #ClashOfClans #eSports #MonthlyQualifier #coc
item.description:
June was decent⚡️
Hyped for Ladder without those💩 eventtroops🔥

#CoCeSports #ClashOfClans #eSports #MonthlyQualifier #coc

item.title: RT by @moscht_coc: Last month didn't go as planned, but with our roster additions we're ready to come back stronger this month! Roster: 🪄 🇩🇪 @magicfnr 🇩🇪 @Clash_Bone (C) 🇦🇹 @moscht_coc 🇩🇪 @Passi2165 🇩🇪 @Holzbein88 🇩🇪 @ pizzabote Next stop, stage 2 🥹
item.description:
Last month didn't go as planned, but with our roster additions we're ready to come back stronger this month!

Roster: 🪄

🇩🇪 @magicfnr
🇩🇪 @Clash_Bone (C)
🇦🇹 @moscht_coc
🇩🇪 @Passi2165
🇩🇪 @Holzbein88
🇩🇪 @ pizzabote

Next stop, stage 2 🥹
